languages.text: {n}Вы выворачиваете руку, сжимающую оружие, и запястье женщины ломается. Ювенна успевает выстрелить, но игла, взвизгнув в воздухе, уходит в сторону. Наследница тщетно пытается вырваться, громко крича от боли и злости.{/n}

{n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы выворачиваете руку, сжимающую оружие, и запястье женщины ломается. Ювенна успевает выстрелить, но игла, взвизгнув в воздухе, уходит в сторону. Наследница тщетно пытается вырваться, громко крича от боли и злости.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

{n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

{n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Retuerces la mano con la que aferra el arma y partes la muñeca de Juvenna. Consigue disparar una vez, pero la aguja silba por el aire, lejos de su objetivo. Juvenna intenta liberarse en vano mientras chilla de dolor y furia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Retuerces la mano con la que aferra el arma y partes la muñeca de Juvenna. Consigue disparar una vez, pero la aguja silba por el aire, lejos de su objetivo. Juvenna intenta liberarse en vano mientras chilla de dolor y furia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你扭住她那只握枪的手，尤文娜的手腕应声折断。她还是勉强开了一枪，但毒针呼啸着偏离了目标。尤文娜徒劳地挣扎着，痛苦与愤怒交织的尖叫回荡开来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你扭住她那只握枪的手，尤文娜的手腕应声折断。她还是勉强开了一枪，但毒针呼啸着偏离了目标。尤文娜徒劳地挣扎着，痛苦与愤怒交织的尖叫回荡开来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous tordez la main qui brandit l'arme, et le poignet de Juvenna se brise. Elle parvient à tirer de justesse, mais l'aiguille fend l'air en sifflant et loupe sa cible. La jeune femme se débat en vain pour échapper à votre étreinte, hurlant sa douleur et sa colère.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous tordez la main qui brandit l'arme, et le poignet de Juvenna se brise. Elle parvient à tirer de justesse, mais l'aiguille fend l'air en sifflant et loupe sa cible. La jeune femme se débat en vain pour échapper à votre étreinte, hurlant sa douleur et sa colère.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Silahı tutan elini büküyorsun, Juvenna'nın bileği kırılıyor. Bir el ateş etmeyi başarıyor ama havada ıslık çalan iğne hedefini bulmuyor. Juvenna; kurtulmak için boşuna çabalıyor, acı ve öfkeyle çığlık atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Silahı tutan elini büküyorsun, Juvenna'nın bileği kırılıyor. Bir el ateş etmeyi başarıyor ama havada ıslık çalan iğne hedefini bulmuyor. Juvenna; kurtulmak için boşuna çabalıyor, acı ve öfkeyle çığlık atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du greifst nach der Waffe in Juvennas Hand und brichst ihr das Handgelenk. Es gelingt ihr noch, einen Schuss abzugeben, aber die Nadel verfehlt ihr Ziel. Juvenna windet sich vergeblich in deinem Griff und schreit vor Schmerz und Wut.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du greifst nach der Waffe in Juvennas Hand und brichst ihr das Handgelenk. Es gelingt ihr noch, einen Schuss abzugeben, aber die Nadel verfehlt ihr Ziel. Juvenna windet sich vergeblich in deinem Griff und schreit vor Schmerz und Wut.{/n}

languages.text: {n}武器を握る彼女の腕をねじると、ジュベナの手首は折れた。彼女はなんとか一発発射するが、空を這う針は標的を逃す。ジュベナは苦痛と怒りで叫びながら、必死に逃れようとするが無駄だった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You twist the hand clutching the weapon, and Juvenna's wrist breaks. She manages to fire off a round, but the needle, whistling through the air, misses its mark. Juvenna struggles in vain to break free, shrieking in pain and fury.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}武器を握る彼女の腕をねじると、ジュベナの手首は折れた。彼女はなんとか一発発射するが、空を這う針は標的を逃す。ジュベナは苦痛と怒りで叫びながら、必死に逃れようとするが無駄だった。{/n}
